questions.question: Peter says to add to faith what sequence of virtues?
options: Goodness, knowledge, self-control, perseverance, godliness, mutual affection, love
questions.correct: Goodness, knowledge, self-control, perseverance, godliness, mutual affection, love
questions.feedback: Add to faith: goodness, knowledge, self-control, perseverance, godliness, mutual affection, love.

questions.question: Peter says Scripture came about not by the prophet's own interpretation but by what?
options: The Holy Spirit carrying men along
questions.correct: The Holy Spirit carrying men along
questions.feedback: Prophecy came as people were carried along by the Holy Spirit.

questions.question: Peter says he was an eyewitness of Christ's majesty.
questions.feedback: Peter was an eyewitness of Christ's majesty on the sacred mountain.

questions.question: God's divine power has given us everything we need for life and _____.
questions.feedback: His divine power has given us everything needed for life and godliness.

questions.question: Make every effort to confirm your calling and _____.
questions.feedback: Make every effort to confirm your calling and election.
